This DNEL was derived using the NOAEL of <hide> mg/kg/day from a <hide>-day oral toxicity study in rats conducted according to OECD test guideline <hide> by oral route (Fabreguettes, <hide>a), after a route to route extrapolation (oral-to-dermal, x <hide>%/<hide>%).
